system.descriptor: With the Tracking Skill, the character can follow the signs left by his quarry, allowing him to hunt them down.
system.uses:
Following obvious tracks does not require a Skill Test and is considered part of a character's movement.
Tracking Tests are required when time, weather, darkness, fog, or the environment make signs difficult to follow.
When the difficulty is harder than Challenging (+0), the tracker's Movement rate drops to half.
If an opponent has attempted to conceal or erase tracks, make an Opposed Test against the prey's Concealment.

description.value:
With the Tracking Skill, the character can follow the signs left by his quarry, allowing him to hunt them down. Following obvious tracks does not require a Skill Test and is considered part of a character's movement.

In instances where time or the elements have eroded the signs, or where darkness, fog, or the environment make them difficult to see, Tracking Tests are required.
